capabilities.name: Billable hourly rate
capabilities.verify: Billable hourly rate field on project

capabilities.name: Milestones
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-06. Skill: manage_project_milestone create live over gateway (Phase 1 milestone with due_date → milestone_id). UI: Milestones section in ProjectsPage + useProjectMilestones hook (list/create/update/reach/reopen/delete + progress bar).
capabilities.notes: Backend verified 2026-06-13; admin UI built + Stage-3 live 2026-07-06.

capabilities.name: Gantt/dependencies
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. Skill: project_task_dependencies table + manage_task_dependency RPC/skill (add/remove/list, same-project + recursive cycle detection — cycle add rejected live) + get_project_schedule RPC/skill (tasks with start/due dates, estimated hours, dependency edges, topological depth, milestones; project_tasks.start_date column added) (migration 20260708020000). UI: Timeline (Gantt) view in ProjectsPage rendering get_project_schedule with status-colored bars, depth ordering, blocked-by chips and milestone markers (Lovable build 2026-07-07).

capabilities.name: Sub-tasks
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-06. Skill: manage_project_task create with parent_task_id live (Subtask A under parent → created). UI: hierarchical task rendering with Add-subtask + per-parent progress in ProjectsPage (commit a141bdbc).
capabilities.notes: Backend verified; admin UI built + Stage-3 live 2026-07-06.

capabilities.name: Resource/capacity planning
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. Skill: resource_capacity_report RPC/skill (per person: open tasks, backlog hours, hours logged, utilization %, weeks_of_backlog, overloaded; scoped or global) — Stage-3 live via gateway. UI: Capacity view in ProjectsPage with utilization bars + overloaded badges (Lovable build 2026-07-07).

capabilities.name: Project templates
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. project_templates table + manage_project_template RPC/skill (create/create_from_project/instantiate/list/get/delete; migration 20260708020000): snapshot tasks+milestones with offset_days, instantiate re-dates from a start date. Stage-3 live: template snapshotted from test project, instantiated as new project with 2 tasks.

capabilities.name: Stage workflow gating
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. projects.task_workflow jsonb + manage_task_workflow RPC/skill (set/get/clear) + enforce_task_workflow BEFORE UPDATE trigger: allowed-transition gate, require_subtasks_done gate, enforce_dependencies gate; no config = no gating (migration 20260708020000). Stage-3 live: todo→done blocked by transition rule, dependency-blocked start rejected, legal path passed.

capabilities.name: Team/stakeholder roles
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. manage_project_member RPC/skill over project_members (add/update/remove/list, role + hourly_rate_override_cents + tracks_time; migration 20260708020000); overrides feed project_cost_forecast. Stage-3 live: manager added with 95000 rate override, listed.

capabilities.name: Cost forecasting/burn rate
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. project_cost_forecast RPC/skill (migration 20260708020000): hours logged, cost with member rate overrides, 28-day burn rate, weeks-to-budget-exhaustion, over_budget_risk vs open task estimates. Stage-3 live on test project (budget 100h).
